    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Deserializer
    Deserializer is a utility class that houses all the logic necessary for deserialization of Strings provided by this library.
    Modification
    Modification is an interface that represents a change in a class between versions.
    SerialArray
    SerialObject is a class that extends SerialObject and represents an array being serialized.
    Serializer
    Serializer is a utility class that houses all the logic necessary for the serialization of any java Object.
    SerialObject
    SerialObject is a class that represents an Object that is being serialized.
    SerialObjectVariable
    SerialObjectVariable is a class that represents a variable that points to an Object.
    SerialPrimitive
    SerialPrimitive is a class that represents a variable that is a primitive datatype.
    SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    SerialPrimitiveType is an enum that represents the datatype of a primitive variable.
    SerialVariable
    SerialVariable is an interface that represents a variable inside a SerialObject.
    Version
    Verson is an interface that represents the history of a class over its lifetime, while it can be serialized and deserialized.
